Next in the story Keeper does look at her in one scene when something happens , and she shakes her head as now , which means she didn't do it by answering their wish , which if she could not grant wishes she would not have done so(bear with me , please)
Also on her wish granting abilities , I think that she has a limit to what she can grant , because she is not an allpowerful being , thus some wishes cannot be granted
